meta.title: Versioning Components Specification
meta.description: Complete specification for version history, comparison, badge, minimap, and popup components used in the DM Tool's script versioning system.

indexExports.description: Barrel file re-exporting all versioning components as named exports.

VersionBadge.description: A compact clickable badge that displays the current version number of a script, with optional unsaved-changes indicator and history icon. Returns null when versioning is not enabled on the script.

properties.name: script
properties.description: The script object whose version info is displayed.

properties.name: onClick
properties.description: Optional click handler; when provided, the badge becomes clickable and shows a history icon when multiple versions exist.

properties.name: showUnsavedIndicator
properties.description: Whether to show the unsaved-changes AlertCircle icon.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Controls badge CSS class and icon pixel size.

conditionalRendering.historyIcon: Shown when onClick is provided AND versionCount > 1.

children.description: Branch icon sized per size prop.

styling.rootTitle: Version {n} of {total}{unsaved note}\nClick to view history

VersionHistory.description: A slide-out overlay panel displaying the full version history of a script. Supports setting a version as current, deleting versions, and comparing any version with the current version. Uses inline confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.

properties.name: script
properties.description: The script whose version history is shown.

properties.name: onClose
properties.description: Callback to close the history panel.

properties.name: onScriptUpdate
properties.description: Callback when the script is mutated (version set/deleted).

properties.name: onCompareVersions
properties.description: Callback to open comparison view between two versions.

stateVariables.name: confirmDelete
stateVariables.description: Version ID for which delete confirmation is showing.

stateVariables.name: confirmSetCurrent
stateVariables.description: Version ID for which set-as-current confirmation is showing.

derivedValues.name: storageSize
derivedValues.description: Storage bytes used by all versions.

formatDate.description: Formats a timestamp to 'MMM DD, YYYY, HH:MM AM/PM' using en-US locale.

handleVersionClick.description: Compares the clicked version with the current version, always placing the older version on the left. Skips if clicking the current version.

handleSetAsCurrent.description: Calls setCurrentVersion(script, versionId) and propagates via onScriptUpdate. Resets confirmSetCurrent.

handleDelete.description: Calls deleteScriptVersion(script, versionId) and propagates via onScriptUpdate. Resets confirmDelete.

children: div.version-history-title containing h3 'Version History' and span.version-history-count '{n} versions'
Close button (btn btn-sm btn-icon) with X icon size 16

children.content: Click any version to compare with current

emptyState.hint: Edit and save your script to create versions (p.version-history-empty-hint)

children: div.version-item-header: span.version-item-number 'v{n}', span.version-item-current-badge 'Current' (conditional)
div.version-item-meta: Clock icon size 12, date span, optional separator dot + message
Set-as-current button (RotateCcw icon 12) with inline Yes/No confirm (btn-xs btn-success)
Delete button (Trash2 icon 12, btn-xs btn-danger) with inline Yes/No confirm, disabled if current+only version
ChevronRight arrow icon 14 (shown for non-current)

interactionPatterns.versionClick: Clicking a non-current version triggers comparison with current (older on left, newer on right).
interactionPatterns.setAsCurrent: Button click shows inline confirm (Yes/No). Clicking Yes calls handleSetAsCurrent. Click propagation stopped.
interactionPatterns.deleteVersion: Button click shows inline confirm (Yes/No). Clicking Yes calls handleDelete. Delete disabled when only 1 version exists and it is current.
interactionPatterns.messageDisplay: Version message is only shown if it differs from the default 'Version {n}' text.

VersionHistoryPopup.description: A full-screen popup combining a left-panel version list with a right-panel inline diff comparison view. Supports version selection, set-as-current, delete, and side-by-side character-level diff with keyboard navigation. This is the primary integrated version history + compare experience.

properties.name: script
properties.description: The script whose version history is displayed.

properties.name: onClose
properties.description: Callback to close the popup.

properties.name: onScriptUpdate
properties.description: Callback when the script is mutated.

properties.name: isDarkTheme
properties.description: Dark theme flag (currently prefixed with underscore, reserved for future use).

stateVariables.name: diffResult
stateVariables.description: Computed diff result between selected and current versions.

stateVariables.name: currentChangeIndex
stateVariables.description: Index of the currently focused change for navigation.

refs.name: diffContainerRef
refs.description: Ref to the diff table wrapper for scroll-to-line navigation.

effects.description: When selection changes, computes diff using computeVersionDiff with contextLines=3, showAllLines=true, charDiff=true. Always places older version on left. Resets currentChangeIndex to 0.
Keyboard listener: Escape closes popup; Ctrl+J/ArrowDown navigates to next change; Ctrl+K/ArrowUp navigates to previous change.

handlers.formatDate: Same en-US locale format as VersionHistory.
handlers.handleVersionClick: Toggles selection: if clicking current version, deselects; otherwise selects the version for comparison.
handlers.handleSetAsCurrent: Sets version as current, clears confirmSetCurrent and selectedVersionId.
handlers.handleDelete: Deletes version, clears confirmDelete, clears selectedVersionId if it was the deleted one.
handlers.navigateToChange: Cycles through change hunks (wrapping). Scrolls the diff container to the target line.
handlers.scrollToLine: Finds the first diff-table-row with data-old-line or data-new-line >= lineNumber and scrolls it into view with smooth behavior and center block alignment.
handlers.renderCharHighlightedContent: Renders CharDiff array as spans. 'unchanged' spans are plain, 'added' spans get diff-char-added (new side only), 'deleted' spans get diff-char-deleted (old side only).
handlers.getAllLines: Flattens hunks into a single LineDiff array.

children: div.version-popup-title: GitCompare icon 18, h3 'Version History - {script.name}', span.version-popup-count '{n} versions'
Close button (btn btn-sm btn-icon) with X icon 18
div.version-popup-list-header: 'Versions' label, span.version-popup-storage '{formattedSize}'
div.version-popup-item-header: span.version-popup-item-name 'v{n}', span.version-popup-item-badge 'Current'
div.version-popup-item-meta: Clock icon 12, date text
div.version-popup-item-message (conditional, if message differs from default)
Set-as-current: RotateCcw icon 12 / confirm with Yes (btn-xs btn-success) + No (btn-xs)
Delete: Trash2 icon 12 (btn-xs btn-danger) / confirm with Yes + No
ChevronRight icon 14 arrow (non-current only)

emptyState.heading: h4 'Select a version to compare'
emptyState.text: p 'Click on any version from the list to compare it with the current version'

children: div.version-popup-compare-info: span.version-popup-compare-label 'Comparing v{old} -> v{new}', div.version-popup-compare-stats: span.stat-added '+{n}', span.stat-deleted '-{n}'
div.version-popup-compare-nav (if totalChanges > 0): ChevronUp prev button, span.version-popup-nav-info '{current}/{total}', ChevronDown next button

cells: td.diff-cell-num (old): empty class when type=added, else diff-cell-{type}
td.diff-cell-content (old): marker span.diff-marker.diff-marker-deleted '−' for deleted/modified, code.diff-code with char highlights for modified
td.diff-cell-num (new): empty class when type=deleted, else diff-cell-{type}
td.diff-cell-content (new): marker span.diff-marker.diff-marker-added '+' for added/modified, code.diff-code with char highlights for modified

interactionPatterns.overlayClickToClose: Clicking the overlay (outside container) closes the popup.
interactionPatterns.versionToggleSelection: Clicking a version toggles selection; clicking current version deselects.
interactionPatterns.diffAutoCompute: Diff is computed automatically via useEffect when selectedVersion changes.
interactionPatterns.changeNavigation: Wrapping circular navigation through non-context hunks.
interactionPatterns.scrollToLine: Smooth scroll to the first row matching or exceeding the target line number.
interactionPatterns.confirmDialogs: Inline Yes/No confirmation for set-as-current and delete, with stopPropagation.

VersionCompare.description: A standalone version comparison component that displays a GitHub-style split diff table with character-level highlights. Supports fullscreen toggle, keyboard navigation, and optional inline mode. Also displays schema diff summary when available.

properties.name: oldVersion
properties.description: The older version for the left side of the diff.

properties.name: newVersion
properties.description: The newer version for the right side of the diff.

properties.name: onClose
properties.description: Callback to close the comparison view.

properties.name: isDarkTheme
properties.description: Dark theme flag (reserved, underscore-prefixed internally).

properties.name: isInline
properties.description: When true, renders inline (no overlay); when false, renders as overlay with optional fullscreen.

refs.name: tableContainerRef
refs.description: Ref to diff-table-wrapper for scroll navigation.

effects.description: Computes diff on mount/prop change using computeVersionDiff(oldVersion, newVersion, 3, true).
Keyboard listener: Escape closes; Ctrl+J/ArrowDown next change; Ctrl+K/ArrowUp prev change.

loadingState.render: div.version-compare-loading containing div.spinner and span 'Computing diff...'

handlers.navigateToChange: Same circular wrapping logic as VersionHistoryPopup. Filters non-context hunks.
handlers.scrollToLine: Queries diff-table-row elements by data-old-line/data-new-line attributes.

uiLayout.rootElement: div with dynamic class (version-compare-inline | version-compare-overlay [+ fullscreen])

children: div.version-compare-title: GitCompare icon 18, h3 'Compare Versions'
div.version-compare-stats: span.stat-added '+{n}', span.stat-deleted '-{n}', span.stat-modified '~{n}' (conditional, if linesModified > 0)
div.version-compare-actions: Fullscreen toggle button (Maximize2/Minimize2 icon 14, overlay mode only), Close button (X icon 16)
Prev button: ChevronUp icon 14 + 'Prev' text
span.version-compare-nav-info 'Change {n} of {total}'
Next button: 'Next' text + ChevronDown icon 14

tbody.rowStructure: Same as VersionHistoryPopup diff table rows (tr.diff-table-row.diff-row-{type} with old/new side cells)

children.section: Schema Diff Summary (div.version-compare-schema, conditional on schemaDiff existing)
children: h4 'Schema Changes'
div.version-compare-schema-stats: span.schema-stat.schema-stat-added '+{n} tables', span.schema-stat.schema-stat-deleted '-{n} tables', span.schema-stat.schema-stat-modified '~{n} tables'

VersionMinimap.description: A vertical minimap component that visualizes diff changes as colored markers within a scrollable track. Supports click-to-navigate and drag-to-scroll via a viewport indicator. Designed to be placed alongside a diff table container.

properties.name: diffResult
properties.description: The diff result used to generate markers.

properties.name: onMarkerClick
properties.description: Callback when clicking a marker or the minimap track.

properties.name: containerRef
properties.description: Ref to the scrollable diff container whose scroll position the minimap tracks.

stateVariables.name: markers
stateVariables.description: Array of positioned diff markers for rendering.

stateVariables.name: isDragging
stateVariables.description: Whether the user is dragging the viewport indicator.

refs.name: minimapRef
refs.description: Ref to the minimap container for coordinate calculations.

derivedValues.name: totalLines
derivedValues.description: Total number of lines in the new version.

effects.description: Regenerates diff markers using generateDiffMarkers(diffResult.hunks, totalLines).
Listens to scroll events on the container to update viewport position. Calculates scrollPercent and viewportHeightPercent, enforcing minimum 5% viewport height.
When dragging, adds global mousemove/mouseup listeners. Mousemove maps cursor position to container scrollTop. Mouseup stops dragging.

handleMinimapClick.description: Calculates click position as percentage of minimap height, converts to line number, and calls onMarkerClick with max(1, lineNumber).

handleDragStart.description: Prevents default, sets isDragging to true.

getMarkerColor.description: Returns CSS variable-based colors for marker types.

uiLayout.rootTitle: Click to navigate, drag viewport to scroll

interactionPatterns.clickOnTrack: Click anywhere on the minimap to navigate to the corresponding line number.
interactionPatterns.clickOnMarker: Click a specific marker to navigate to that change's start line (propagation stopped to avoid track click).
interactionPatterns.dragViewport: Mouse-down on viewport indicator starts drag. Moving the mouse scrolls the container proportionally. Mouse-up ends drag.
interactionPatterns.viewportTracking: Viewport position updates on every scroll event of the container.

diffTableStructure.description: A GitHub-style side-by-side (split) diff table structure shared by VersionCompare and VersionHistoryPopup.
diffTableStructure.layout: 4-column table: old line number | old content | new line number | new content
diffTableStructure.emptyCell: diff-cell-empty (used for added rows on old side, deleted rows on new side)

confirmDialogPattern.description: Inline confirmation dialog used for destructive actions (set-as-current, delete).
confirmDialogPattern.structure: Shows prompt text + Yes button + No button, replacing the action button.
confirmDialogPattern.eventHandling: All buttons use e.stopPropagation() to prevent parent click handlers.

changeNavigation.description: Circular change navigation with keyboard shortcuts, shared by VersionCompare and VersionHistoryPopup.
changeNavigation.algorithm: Filters hunks to non-context types, uses modular arithmetic for wrapping.
